rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Settlement Of Account And Approval Of Attorneys Fees And Reimbursement Of Costs For 2014-2015
rulings.Rulings: continued to 4/20/20 for filing an amended accounting. the assets on hand at the commencement of the account period must be identical to the assets on hand as of the end of the prior account. the 2013 account ended with $51,511.80 cash, and this petition lists $50,817.94 cash in its starting value. in addition, the source of the $5,000 cash receipt must be identified and the $100 miscellaneous disbursement must be further explained.
